index.title: Umusemuzi w'Ibikoresho
index.description: Open machine-translated pull requests for resource files in any repo, in any format.
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Resource Translator opens machine-translated pull requests for your resource files using Azure AI Translator via the official SDK — no extra services, just a workflow.
index.workflowTitle: Guhindura ni igikorwa c'akazi, si igikorwa c'ubuvuzi.
index.workflowBody: Shira igikorwa muri CI yawe isanzwe, uyiyerekeze kuri Azure AI Translator, hanyuma ureke repo yawe ivuge ururimi rwose wipfuza.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Drop a .github/resource-translator.yml for include globs, glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Funga amazina y'ibicuruzwa hamwe n'amajambo y'ibicuruzwa ukoresheje regex y'umupaka w'ijambo rigenga C++, .NET, hamwe n'abagenzi.

dryRun.title: Swimwear + Swimwear
dryRun.body: Preview translations without writing files, or surface every error as a warning while you iterate.

outputs.title: PR-friendly outputs
outputs.body: summary-title, summary-details, and has-new-translations line directly into create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: Built on @azure-rest/ai-translation-text + @azure/core-rest-pipeline — automatic retries on 408/429/5xx, no hand-rolled HTTP. esbuild-bundled, audit-clean.

getting-started.title: Gutangura
getting-started.lede: Ongeraho dosiye y'akazi, uyiyerekeze ku vyemezo vyawe vya Azure AI Translator, hanyuma igikorwa - cubatswe kuri SDK yemewe ya Microsoft @azure-rest / ai-translation-text - kizosuzumisha repo y'amadosiye y'ururimi rw'inkomoko hanyuma gisohore abavukanyi bahinduwe.

provision.title: Provision an Azure AI Translator resource
provision.body: Create an Azure AI Translator resource in the Azure portal, then store the following as GitHub repository secrets so the workflow can read them:

resource.title: Commit a source resource file
resource.body: Resource files use the Name. <sourceLocale>. <ext> Ikoraniro. Nk'akarorero, Greetings.en.resx iba Greetings.fr.resx, Greetings.de.resx, n'ibindi inyuma yo kwiruka.

output.title: Genzura ibisohoka
output.body: Mu gihe igikorwa kirangiye, igikorwa gishira ahabona ibintu bitatu ushobora gushiraho mu bisobanuro vya PR: summary-title, summary-details, na has-new-translations. It also writes a Markdown summary into the job page via core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Intambwe zikurikira
nextSteps.recipes: See recipes for monorepos, custom glossaries, and Custom Translator categories.

configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.lede: Express defaults once in .github/resource-translator.yml and let every workflow inherit them. Action inputs always win when both are provided

inputs.title: Inputs & Outputs
inputs.lede: Buri kintu cose kiboneka kandi muri repo config file. Mu gihe vyompi bimaze gushirwaho, inyifato y'igikorwa iratsinda.

formats.title: Imiterere y'amadosiye
formats.lede: Six round-trippable resource formats. The action reads each source-locale file, translates the values, and writes a sibling per target locale.

recipes.title: Ibifungurwa
recipes.lede: Common patterns for shipping translations: monorepos, glossaries, custom categories, dry runs, and tone control.

faq.title: Ibibazo bikunze kubazwa
faq.lede: Inyishu zihuta z'ibibazo bikunze kwibazwa igihe umaze gufata inyishu.

translations.title: Traductions
translations.pendingPrefix: Mu kurindira ikiganiro gikurikira ca Translate-Docs.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Rondera izina ry'ikirundi, izina ry'ikirundi canke izina ry'ikirundi...
translations.translationPending: Translation pending — open a translate-docs run.

contributing.title: Gutanga intererano
contributing.lede: Bug reports, feature requests, and pull requests are all welcome. Ico gikorwa ni gito bihagije ku buryo gifasha abatanga intererano ubwa mbere.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.lede: Incamake y'ibisohokayandikiro vyo ku rwego rwo hejuru. The canonical, authoritative changelog lives in CHANGELOG.md in the repository.
